notes: [New] Raid Boss (Prime Clash) — shared map boss fights for up to 5 hunters with one HP pool; mid-fight joins keep the current HP ratio
[New] Post-raid catch phase — 5 balls, boosted catch rate, XP, rare candy, and species candy rewards
[New] Raid bosses and spawn points in config/raids.lua — Prime Solarchis, Prime Abyssoth, Prime Drakoval, and more; auto-spawn scheduler
[New] Daily raid limit (RaidsPerDay) tracked per player
[New] 4 evolution chains — Water (Axolune → Crystolune → Abyssalune), Dark (Shrubble → Nightrix), Psychic (Owlei → Psiwing → Aethera), Grass (Bloomlet → Thornhop → Petalstorm)
[New] 4 raid badges — first join, first win, 10 raids, 50 raids
